title: daucus rouyi
intro: Daucus rouyi, commonly known as Chinese Queen Anne's lace, is a plant species in the carrot family (Apiaceae) native to China. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits, which include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting liver function. The plant's therapeutic actions are attributed to its ability to calm the nervous system, lower blood pressure, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Bioactive constituents of Daucus rouyi include volatile oils, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
